changelog: Fixed: Exercise card animation glitch – extracted SortableExerciseItem to stable module scope so React stops remounting DOM on every render, fixing expand/collapse transition jumping.
Fixed: backButton listener spam – useBackButton now uses useRef to stabilize callback, eliminating 28+ addListener/removeListener cycles per render.

Fixed: Notification sound 5-second delay – removed sound:'default' from createChannel/schedule calls that mapped to a nonexistent raw resource, letting the native channel use the correct system default sound.
Fixed: Notification channel migration – one-time native plugin call force-deletes and recreates the rest_timers channel on existing installs so the system default sound actually plays.
Fixed: Drag overlay positioning in Edit Routine – compact pill layout with grip handle icon so dragged item name appears close to the cursor instead of floating above it.
Fixed: Dashboard patch notes – added v2.8.4 changelog (was stuck showing v2.8.3 as active version).
Fixed: Download button null-guard – added safety check for missing workout data with visible error toast.
